_comment: SCRUBBED EXAMPLE of the task-board MCP registration. This is how the task-board MCP server is registered with Claude Code. The live registration lives in ~/.claude.json under the top-level "mcpServers" key (one entry per MCP server). On install, scripts/install.sh ALSO writes a standalone ~/.claude/mcp-servers/task-board/mcp.json with the resolved absolute path. Copy the "task-board" block below into your ~/.claude.json mcpServers map (or run scripts/install.sh which generates mcp.json for you). No secrets are required for the task-board server itself (env is empty). Replace ${HOME} with your real home directory absolute path; Claude Code does not expand env vars in this file.
